paper.title: Pore structure and chloride permeability of concrete containing nano-particles for pavement

evidence.evidence_text: Concrete mixture table lists water, cement, sand, coarse aggregate, PP fiber, nano-SiO2, nano-TiO2, UNF-5 and defoamer.
Table 4 shows compressive and flexural strengths of concretes at 28 days; compressive strength values are in MPa.
Text states Table 4 shows compressive and flexural strengths of concretes at 28 days.
